final:
module RefModule(
  output reg [7:0] op,
  input clk,
  input ce,
  input clr
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (clr) begin
      op <= 8'b0;
    end else if (ce) begin
      op <= 8'b00000001;
    end
  end

endmodule
